SEARCH

Class GameMap

java.lang.Object
GameMap
Direct Known Subclasses:
GameMap1, GameMap2
public abstract class GameMap extends Object
The GameMap class represents the 2D map of Chip's Challenge. This abstract class also determines/creates the structure of the map where different MapElements are placed. Each subclass of GameMap must also define their own layout and placement of different MapElement

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GameMap()
    The constructor that initializes the map to a 20x20 grid (toned-down version), fills it with BlankTiles, and prepares the map elements that are specific for the different subclasses/maps.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    createHorizontalWall(int row, int startCol, int endCol)
    This method creates a horizontal wall by filling a row with WallTile objects
    protected void
    createVerticalWall(int col, int startRow, int endRow)
    THis method creates a vertical wall by filling a column with WallTile objects
    void
    fillMap()
    This method fills the grid/map with blank tiles and called during map initialization.
    MapElement[][]
    getMap()
    This method returns the 2D map of Chip's challenge.
    int
    getMapLength()
    This method returns the length of the game map.
    int
    getMapWidth()
    This method returns the width of the game map.
    int
    getRequiredMicrochips()
    This method returns the required amount of microchips in the map
    int
    getSpawnX()
    This method returns Chip's spawn x coordinte
    int
    getSpawnY()
    This method returns Chip's spawn y coordinte
    abstract void
    prepareMapElements()
    This abstract method that must be implemented by subclasses/specific maps to define specific map layouts, item placement, etc.
    void
    setPlayerSpawn(int xPosition, int yPosition)
    This method sets Chip's starting/spawn position in the map
    void
    setRequiredMicrochips(int requiredMicrochips)
    This method sets the required number of microchips for Chip to win the current level

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • GameMap

      public GameMap()
      The constructor that initializes the map to a 20x20 grid (toned-down version), fills it with BlankTiles, and prepares the map elements that are specific for the different subclasses/maps.

  • Method Details

    • fillMap

      public void fillMap()
      This method fills the grid/map with blank tiles and called during map initialization.

    • prepareMapElements

      public abstract void prepareMapElements()
      This abstract method that must be implemented by subclasses/specific maps to define specific map layouts, item placement, etc.

    • setPlayerSpawn

      public void setPlayerSpawn(int xPosition, int yPosition)
      This method sets Chip's starting/spawn position in the map
      Parameters:
      xPosition - - x coordinate where Chip spawns
      yPosition - - y coordinate where Chip spawns

    • getSpawnX

      public int getSpawnX()
      This method returns Chip's spawn x coordinte
      Returns:
      int of x coordinate of the Chip's spawn position

    • getSpawnY

      public int getSpawnY()
      This method returns Chip's spawn y coordinte
      Returns:
      int of y coordinate of the Chip's spawn position

    • getMap

      public MapElement[][] getMap()
      This method returns the 2D map of Chip's challenge.
      Returns:
      2D array representing the game map/layout

    • getMapLength

      public int getMapLength()
      This method returns the length of the game map.
      Returns:
      number of rows in the 2D map

    • getMapWidth

      public int getMapWidth()
      This method returns the width of the game map.
      Returns:
      number of columns in the 2D map

    • setRequiredMicrochips

      public void setRequiredMicrochips(int requiredMicrochips)
      This method sets the required number of microchips for Chip to win the current level
      Parameters:
      requiredMicrochips - - number of microchips needed in order to exit/win

    • getRequiredMicrochips

      public int getRequiredMicrochips()
      This method returns the required amount of microchips in the map
      Returns:
      number of required microchips to complete/exit the level

    • createVerticalWall

      protected void createVerticalWall(int col, int startRow, int endRow)
      THis method creates a vertical wall by filling a column with WallTile objects
      Parameters:
      col - - column index where vertical wall should be placed
      startRow - - starting row index of wall
      endRow - - ending row index of wall

    • createHorizontalWall

      protected void createHorizontalWall(int row, int startCol, int endCol)
      This method creates a horizontal wall by filling a row with WallTile objects
      Parameters:
      row - - row index where horizontal wall should be placed
      startCol - - starting col index of wall
      endCol - - ending col index of wall
